SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model

Class StructuredObjectiveCard

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Card
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.ObjectiveCard
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.StructuredObjectiveCard
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class StructuredObjectiveCard extends ObjectiveCard
Class StructuredObjectiveCard Description: This class represents an objective card that requires a specific structure to be completed. It extends the ObjectiveCard class.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • StructuredObjectiveCard

      public StructuredObjectiveCard(int idCard, int points, Structure structureType, ArrayList<Content> resourceRequested)
      Constructor for the StructuredObjectiveCard class.
      Parameters:
      idCard - The ID of the card.
      points - The points awarded for completing the objective.
      structureType - The type of structure required to complete the objective.
      resourceRequested - The list of resources required to complete the objective.

    • verifyObjective

      public int verifyObjective(PlayerGround ground)
      Verifies if the objective is completed based on the player's ground.
      Specified by:
      verifyObjective in class ObjectiveCard
      Parameters:
      ground - The player's ground to check for the required structure and resources.
      Returns:
      The points awarded for completing the objective.
